name: AGI Farm — Multi-Agent Team Builder
description: Bootstrap complete multi-agent AI teams with Paperclip dashboard, auto-dispatcher, and infrastructure. Includes interactive wizard, SOUL.md generation, comms setup, cron registration, and OpenClaw gateway integration.
author: oabdelmaksoud

paperclipPort.description: Port for the Paperclip dashboard server

paperclipHost.description: Bind address for the Paperclip server

autoStartPaperclip.description: Automatically start Paperclip when plugin loads

paperclipDeploymentMode.description: Paperclip deployment mode (local_trusted for dev, authenticated for production)

bundlePath.description: Path to AGI Farm bundle (defaults to <workspace>/agi-farm-bundle)

autoCheckUpdates.description: Automatically check GitHub for plugin updates on startup

featureJobs.description: Enable jobs runtime APIs and background worker

featureMemory.description: Enable memory indexing and search APIs

featurePolicy.description: Enable policy engine for runtime actions

paperclipPort.label: Paperclip Port
paperclipPort.description: Port for the Paperclip dashboard server

paperclipHost.label: Paperclip Host
paperclipHost.description: Bind address for the Paperclip server

autoStartPaperclip.label: Auto-Start Paperclip
autoStartPaperclip.description: Automatically start Paperclip when OpenClaw loads

bundlePath.label: Bundle Path
bundlePath.description: Path to AGI Farm team bundle directory

autoCheckUpdates.label: Auto-Check Updates
autoCheckUpdates.description: Check GitHub for new releases when plugin loads

featureJobs.label: Feature: Jobs
featureJobs.description: Enable jobs runtime APIs and background worker

featureMemory.label: Feature: Memory
featureMemory.description: Enable memory indexing and search APIs

featurePolicy.label: Feature: Policy
featurePolicy.description: Enable policy engine for runtime actions

tools.name: hire_specialist
tools.description: Autonomously hire and provision a new specialized agent to the team.

tools.name: create_company
tools.description: Create a new company/team in Paperclip dashboard. Use when starting a new venture or when no company exists.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a new project in Paperclip. Auto-creates company if none exists.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a task (issue) in Paperclip and assign to an agent. Auto-creates company if none exists.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update task status, reassign, change priority, or add comments in Paperclip.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects in Paperclip. Use before creating a new project to avoid duplicates.

tools.name: manage_board
tools.description: Query board state — see tasks by status, agent, or project. Get stats and overview.

commands.name: agi-farm setup
commands.description: Interactive wizard to create a new multi-agent AI team

commands.name: agi-farm status
commands.description: Show team health: agents, tasks, cron status

commands.name: agi-farm rebuild
commands.description: Regenerate workspace from existing bundle (preserves edits)

commands.name: agi-farm export
commands.description: Push team bundle to GitHub repository

commands.name: agi-farm dashboard
commands.description: Launch Paperclip dashboard for team management

commands.name: agi-farm dispatch
commands.description: Run auto-dispatcher — fires agent sessions for pending tasks

commands.name: agi-farm teardown
commands.description: Completely uninstall and teardown the active AGI Farm team
